zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux"於1217年10月8日出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓拉 洛-波納德時，他的父親Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond31歲，母親Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany17歲。他於1236年1月16日與Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年10月8日在法國布列塔尼莫比韓費艾雷爾享年69歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼莫比韓比利爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux"于1217年10月8日出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓拉 洛-波納德时，他的父亲Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond31岁，母亲Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany17岁。他于1236年1月16日与Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年10月8日在法国布列塔尼莫比韓費艾雷爾享年69岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼莫比韓比利爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" was born on 8 October 1217, in La Roche-Bernard, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, was 31 and his mother, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, was 17. He married Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany on 16 January 1236. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 October 1286, in Férel, Morbihan, Brittany, France, at the age of 69, and was buried in Billiers, Morbihan, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" est né le 8 octobre 1217, à La Roche-Bernard, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany le 16 janvier 1236. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1286, à Férel, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Billiers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France.

de.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" am 8. Oktober 1217 in La Roche-Bernard, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond 31 und seine Mutter Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany 17. Er hat am 16. Januar 1236 Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1286 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Férel, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Billiers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany il 16 gennaio 1236. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 ottobre 1286, nel Férel, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Billiers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux"(이)가 1217년 10월 8일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 라 록헤-버나르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1236년 1월 16일 Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1286년 10월 8일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 프e럴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 빌리어스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" nasceu em 8 de outubro de 1217, em La Roche-Bernard, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany em 16 de janeiro de 1236. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1286, em Férel, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Billiers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" родился 8 октября 1217 г. в местности ла роше-бирнард, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Pierre I "Mauclerc" Bretagne, de Duc de Bretagne (1213-1221), 1st Earl of Richmond было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alix de Thouars Duchess of Brittany, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany 16 января 1236 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 октября 1286 г. в местности фeрел, морбихань, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности биллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция.
